question:
Will Cruzeiro EC win on 2025-11-20?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 20, 2025
If Cruzeiro EC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/competicoes/campeonato-brasileiro-serie-a

Parágrafo único – O mando de campo das partidas pertencerá ao Clube colocado à esquerda da tabela elaborada pela DCO. Art. 15 – Em caso de empate em pontos ganhos entre 2 (dois) ou mais Clubes ao final do CAMPEONATO, o desempate, para efeito de classificação final, será efetuado observando-se os critérios abaixo. 1º) Maior número de vitórias; 2º) Maior saldo de gols; 3º) Maior número de gols pró; 4º) Confronto direto; 5º) Menor número de cartões vermelhos recebidos; 6º) Menor número de [...] recomendando-se o nível mínimo de 1.300 (mil e trezentos) lux com uniformidade 0,6 na vertical, bem como atendam aos requisitos mínimos de qualidade, conforme as diretrizes emitidas pela CBF. § 1º – No caso de o estádio utilizado pelo Clube mandante não atender ao previsto neste artigo, este Clube deverá indicar outro estádio que atenda ao estabelecido para a realização de suas partidas. § 2º –...

evidences.title: Escape to Atletico Mineiro Vs Cruzeiro 2025: A Derby Preview
evidences.content: Atletico Mineiro is known for its tactical flexibility. They are known for their ability to adjust their formation and approach depending on their opponent and the specific circumstances of the match. In 2025, we might see them line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with a solid defense, a dynamic midfield, and a pacey front three to exploit any vulnerabilities in the Cruzeiro backline. They can also shift to a 4-2-3-1, with a defensive midfielder providing protection to the defense and allowing the attacking midfielders to roam freely. The coach’s main aim will be to control the midfield, win the possession battle, and create chances through quick passing and clever movement. Their game plan might involve high pressing to disrupt Cruzeiro’s build-up play and to force them into making mistakes. [...] ## Tactical Battles and Expected Formations Tactics and formations are super important in any big game, and the Atletico Mineiro vs. Cruzeiro clash in 2025 will be no exception! Coaches spend weeks analyzing opponents, devising game plans, and strategizing to gain an edge. Let’s take a look at what we can expect from a tactical perspective. Bear in mind, this is all speculation, but it’s fun...

evidences.title: An in depth look at the game of the season between Flamengo and Cruzeiro - TribalFootball.com
evidences.content: To date, in 13 Serie A home matches this season, Flamengo remain unbeaten with nine wins and four draws to their name. In fact, their run stretches back to last season, with their last home loss coming in October 2024 against Juventude. Current form is also good, with o Fla having won four and drawn the other two. By contrast, Cruzeiro's record away from home is five wins, four draws and three losses, though in their last six, they've won four, drawn one and lost just one. ## Good news for Cruzeiro Some good news for the visitors is that they may have a full squad to choose from. On loan from Bournemouth, Luis Sinisterra is back in training, and the expectation is that he will return for the game. [...] Looking at the head-to-head record in the last six Serie A fixtures, Flamengo have lost just once - the fixture in May 2025. Prior to that match, they had drawn one and won the other four. Never a high-scoring game during that time, only once - back in 2023 - had a game been decided by more than one goal. Flamengo vs Cruzeiro - Recent head-to-head resultsFlashscore That may change after Flamengo's recent run of good form, plus the fact that they have scored 50 goals in the league...

evidences.content: Art. 61 - A comissão disciplinar decidirá por todos os casos omissos a este regulamento geral, procurando sempre respeitar as leis e o regulamento que regem o futebol brasileiro, ou seja, o Código Brasileiro de Justiça Disciplinar Desportiva (CBJDD). Art. 62 – Os membros desta comissão não estarão na obrigação de assistir a nenhuma partida do campeonato, procurando agir de forma honesta e imparcial mediante os fatos relatados nas súmulas e resolvidos dentro da Legislação Pátria, sempre invocando o ESPÍRITO ESPORTIVO E NORMAS DA ÉTICA ESPORTIVA. Art. 63 – A Comissão Disciplinar poderá atuar diretamente na punição, suspensão e veto dos integrantes da equipe de arbitragem da competição, desde que observados atos que reprovem a postura e a parcialidade nas partidas da competição. Art. 64 – As [...] fizerem necessárias para que se possa conhecer o Campeão do Campeonato Municipal de Futebol de Campo 2025. evidences.title: Cruzeiro Esporte Clube – Delima Soccer
evidences.content: ##### Club History Cruzeiro Esporte Clube was founded on January 2, 1921 by a group of Italian immigrants who came to Belo Horizonte. The club’s first name was Societa Esportiva Palestra Italia and its colors were white, green, and red representing the Italian flag. Until 1924, only Italian immigrants were allowed to play on the team. In January of 1942, at the height of WWII, the Brazilian Federal government prohibited any club from associating with any country that was an ally to Germany, forcing the team to change its name and colors. [...] ##### The Cruzeiro Esporte Clube Package Includes: Airport pick-up and drop-off 24-hour supervision Training by Cruzeiro’s professional Brazilian coaching staff Friendly games with club?s youth division teams Lodging at Cruzeiro Hotel, in the center of training 3 meals per day: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner Free Laundry service Free Wi-Fi On-site Medical Assistance, including Physical Therapy if needed Ticket to professional game (if schedule permits) ##### The Training Center facility is well-equipped with the following amenities: [...] On October of 1942, Cruzeiro Esporte Clube was born under the celestial five star constellation bearing...

evidences.title: Brazil Climate - Weather in Belo Horizonte | Aventura do Brasil
evidences.content: In the summer (December to February) the weather is usually quite hot and it rains a lot. The average high temperatures during this time are between 29 °C and 30 °C (84 °F to 86 °F), but average temperatures of only 19 °C to 20 °C (66 °F to 68 °F) can also occur. Summer is the wettest time of the year in Belo Horizonte with average rainfall of 200 mm to 300 mm (7.9 in to 11.8 in) per month. In the winter (June to August) it gets a bit cooler, but not very cold. High temperatures are between 26 °C and 28 °C (79 °F to 82 °F) and even on cool days the average temperature rarely falls below 13 °C (55 °F). The weather in the winter is generally very dry, with very little rainfall. The average rainfall during this time is only 10 mm to 40mm (0.4 in to 1.6 in) per month. In the spring (September [...] 40mm (0.4 in to 1.6 in) per month. In the spring (September to November) and fall (March to May), temperatures are pleasantly warm. These seasons are therefore particularly suitable for excursions and discovery tours in the city itself and its beautiful surroundings. The average temperature during these months is between 15 °C and 29 °C (59 °F to 84 °F). During the day, the city is usuall...
